title: Compatibility Patch for Faithful64x & FreshAnimations
description: Allows the usage of Fresh Animations with Faithful64x
body:
## Summary
This resource pack makes Fresh Animations compatible with Faithful - 64x \
Without this pack the eyes of mobs will not show up or will use the default minecraft texturepack resolution depending on pack order.

## Pack Order
This pack\
Faithful - 64x\
Fresh Animations\
![Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d75a67fd0a3b5437f3f474f0ff2b0de3b1da9fa7.png)

## Fabric or Optifine Required
[emf](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)\
[etf](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

## 
## Credit all user follow all referenced packs licenses
[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/)\
[Faithful64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x)
